summary: Full backend (13 pytest cases, all passing) + frontend (welcome, signup, dashboard, member detail, alerts ack, add-member modal, SOS) validation for KinnectCare. All 8 backend endpoint groups and 6 frontend flows pass. No critical issues.

minor.issue: passlib bcrypt __about__ AttributeError warning at startup (cosmetic only — hashing/verify confirmed working via signup+login tests)

issues: React Native Web warns: 'shadow*' style props deprecated, use boxShadow
Unsplash avatar image URLs fail with ERR_NAME_NOT_RESOLVED on web preview console; fallback initials shown for new members. Non-blocking but noisy.

react_native_issues.issue: Expo doctor reports mismatches: @react-native-async-storage/async-storage@3.0.2 (expected 2.2.0), expo-location@55.1.9 (expected ~19.0.8), expo-secure-store@55.0.13 (expected ~15.0.8). App works on web but may misbehave on Expo Go.

action_items: Optional: replace shadow* with boxShadow on web styles, replace props.pointerEvents with style.pointerEvents to silence RN-Web warnings.
Optional: align expo-location / expo-secure-store / async-storage versions with the installed Expo SDK per `npx expo install --check` to avoid native runtime issues on device.
Optional: host avatar images on a CDN reachable from preview, or ship local assets, to avoid ERR_NAME_NOT_RESOLVED console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~470 lines and still cohesive; consider splitting into routers (auth/members/alerts/reminders/checkins/sos) if it grows further.
All Mongo queries correctly project out _id and use owner_id scoping — good.
Auth uses JWT HS256 with env JWT_SECRET (fallback dev secret present) — acceptable for MVP.
Pydantic EmailStr enforced; duplicate-signup returns 409; invalid login returns 401 — verified.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of tested flows (welcome, signup, dashboard, SOS button visible+tappable, member detail+check-in btn, alerts list+ack, add-member modal)

seed_data_creation: Each fresh signup auto-seeds Gregory(35,family), James(78,senior), 3 reminders, 3 alerts — confirmed in tests and UI.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Test users created with pattern tester+<rand>@kinnectcare.app / password123. Demo user demo@kinnectcare.app/password123 also available. Bottom tabs use role='tab' (Family at index 0, Alerts at index 1). All testIDs from review_request are wired correctly. SOS confirmation is via window.confirm on web (Alert.alert) — handled by Playwright's default dialog auto-accept.
